velocity_vs_rigour_quote: Establish data governance, quality testing, and mentoring for junior team members
velocity_vs_rigour_reasoning: Five rigour signals (testing, quality, governance, clean data, SSOT, mentoring) present with zero velocity signals.
domain_risk_quote: Partner consultatively with Product, Go-to-Market, and business teams on data-driven insights
domain_risk_reasoning: B2B SaaS role affecting business metrics (ARR, NRR, churn) without explicit regulatory, compliance, or financial reporting implications.
data_team_maturity_quote: Design, build, test, and maintain end-to-end data models within dbt-powered systems
data_team_maturity_reasoning: Established tools (dbt, Airflow, AWS stack) and infrastructure with ongoing enhancement toward self-serve capabilities.
jd_authorship_quote: Design, build, test, and maintain end-to-end data models within dbt-powered systems
jd_authorship_reasoning: Technical specificity (dbt, AI data agents, self-serve solutions) mixed with generic stakeholder management language.
stakeholder_orientation_quote: Partner consultatively with Product, Go-to-Market, and business teams on data-driven insights
stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: The role explicitly serves Product (product stakeholder) and Go-to-Market (commercial stakeholder), plus enables self-serve for the data team (internal_data stakeholder).
autonomy_level_quote: shift the team from reactive support toward proactive strategy, addressing complex data architecture while enabling organizational self-serve capabilities
autonomy_level_reasoning: The role combines strategic direction-setting ('shift toward proactive strategy', 'establish governance') with execution-focused responsibilities (design, build, maintain models).
greenfield_vs_fix_quote: shift the team from reactive support toward proactive strategy
ai_role_quote: Design, build, test, and maintain end-to-end data models within dbt-powered systems
ai_role_reasoning: dbt-focused technical work with no AI tooling, AI-building, or AI-first mindset signals.
testing_framing_quote: Establish data governance, quality testing, and mentoring for junior team members
testing_framing_reasoning: Establish + quality testing indicates candidate owns quality practice as core responsibility.
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Data governance and quality testing frame reliability/stability concerns, but lack explicit compliance or regulatory language.
